summary:
SPIRITUAL MAINTENANCE AND DISNEY THEME PARK VISION: Brandon recounts his urgency to pray and emphasizes the need to take communion, keep strife out of the house, and maintain love. Brandon describes a vision of Orlando, specifically the Tron ride and a go-kart area in Magic Kingdom, where evildoers infiltrated the security guard system. He notes seeing Asian women tourists with Mickey Mouse ears and describes a blurred darkness, prompting a directive to pray over the theme park.

CALIFORNIA BIRTHDAY PARTY TRAGEDY: Brandon details an intense period of intercession involving his daughter Paisley, which ended abruptly. He states that the Lord later informed him the intercession was for an event at a California birthday party where four children died, marking a manifestation that could no longer be stopped.

DOMESTIC INFILTRATION AND INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon issues a warning about a Trojan horse invasion and a new D-Day or Red Dawn scenario in the United States. He explains that terrorist brotherhoods and evildoers have infiltrated every state, the government, the police force, the FBI, and the top tier of the Pentagon. Brandon explicitly notes that these individuals do not fit a specific stereotype and include white, black, Mexican, and Asian people. Furthermore, Brandon describes union workers at shipyards smuggling weapons and explosives inside shipping containers. He also highlights an attack plot involving 3D-printed non-metallic weapons in the New York subway and outlines underground communication networks using burner phones and SIM cards across Boston, Chicago, Seattle, and Honolulu, noting that the NSA and FBI recently cut off a major supply line of this chatter in New York.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND POLITICAL CORRUPTION: Brandon discusses international affairs, beginning with an alleged missing 100 billion dollars in Ukrainian aid, claiming 24 billion dollars went into a slush fund through specific senators. He claims to have seen cocaine coming out of Volodymyr Zelensky's nose during a broadcast and describes a vision of Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin negotiating in Alaska to remove Zelensky in favor of a proxy government. Brandon states that Emmanuel Macron and older businessmen are pushing for a black swan event to drag America into war to save the failing Euro. Additionally, Brandon predicts a proxy government and liberation coming to Venezuela despite a current haze of witchcraft.

TARGETED INDIVIDUALS AND INSTITUTIONS: Brandon relays a warning for Candace Owens, stating that an operative is plotting to make an assassination look like an accident because she has uncovered truths previously dismissed as conspiracies. He also issues a warning to Catholics, forecasting attacks on churches in Europe and the Vatican during Christmas mass. Furthermore, Brandon details a vision concerning Joel Osteen's church, identifying evil men and terrorists who have infiltrated the congregation as volunteer ushers.

ANGELIC CONDUCT AND DEMONIC DELIVERANCE: Brandon provides instructions on the spiritual realm, strictly warning against attempting to converse with angels or demons. He asserts that righteous angels focus solely on the Father and do not act as companions, while communicating with spirits invites demonic deception. Brandon recounts his own past of severe demonic torment and deliverance, contrasting this with the ultimate doom of occultists like Anton LaVey. He also shares an account of a young woman heavily involved in animal sacrifice and Satanism who experienced complete deliverance from demonic influence.

ECONOMIC UPHEAVAL AND CRYPTOCURRENCY PREDICTIONS: Brandon shares a financial vision regarding a coming digital dollar, Central Bank Digital Currencies, and institutional crypto adoption. He describes a massive debt bubble filled with acid that Donald Trump pops with a red thumbtack, unleashing new crypto-backed lending platforms. Brandon highlights May as a critical month for interest rates and instructs people to ride the wave of wealth transfer. He specifically mentions figures and entities like Eric Trump, Elon Musk, Michael Saylor, the Winklevoss twins, CZ Zhao, Apple Pay, Bank of America, Citibank, and Wells Fargo as integral to this new financial architecture.

MIGRATION GLOBAL CURRENCIES AND STORMS: Brandon forecasts a mass migration of people leaving the East and Northeast United States for Oklahoma and Texas. He visually describes the Japanese Yen and the Euro in severe trouble, specifically depicting the Euro floating on a raft over a massive waterfall surrounded by cedar trees. Finally, Brandon shares a vision of Donald Trump dressed like George Washington, steering a Mayflower-like boat through a violent storm, remaining entirely focused on the horizon despite the surrounding chaos.
rawData: [December 01, 2025]-[Today prayer was interesting a glimpse into the new financial system - The beast system is coming]-[https://youtu.be/S71ffr0WDtg]-[Well, good evening family. Thank you for joining us. Again, I have an urgency to pray all the time. I feel it's been my MO, I guess, my modus operandi. It's been very intense lately. And you know, I'm so thankful that every one of you would come on at this late hour of the night to pray with me. There are 1,400 of you so quickly. And I know I go on all over the world and probably not a lot of Americans are up at this time, but this is the time I pray a lot. So, I just always come on with y'all and it feels like we get a lot accomplished very quickly, for many hands make light work. Let's go over some of the things the Lord said in the last video and what we saw. I won't go over the prophetic word. Diana said it was five to ten pages—ten pages, five front and back—of everything the Lord said. If you have not watched that video, go to the last part of the last video we did. That word was very powerful from the Father. It was one of those words that will forever change your life; it shook us. This whole thing, like I said, is... these times are so precious that we're living in right now, and we have a lot of work to do in the spirit realm. First off, I want to say this: taking communion before you pray and keeping strife out of your house—keeping the flow. You must walk in love in these last days. I keep saying that over and over again because of the things the Lord keeps bringing up to me. Don't give place to the devil at all in your house. Keep strife out of your house. I know it's easier said than done some days, but I'm trying to warn you by things that I got tonight that you must stay in a constant flow of the presence of God and love. Make love a priority in your home. Above everything else, keep love a priority. So, let's go over what I saw yesterday. I saw Mickey Mouse. Everybody said, 'What's the mouse?' Mickey Mouse. I saw Orlando. I saw the Lord showed us Tron, which is a ride in Magic Kingdom. I saw security guards and that was what I thought was interesting; it was highlighted to me. Did I see them doing anything? No. The Lord said to pray over Orlando. So, you can automatically kind of put things together without Him coming on directly and exposing everything. Maybe He'll show us more tonight, maybe not. But He was showing security guards that had infiltrated the security system of Disney, these evildoers. And the Lord said, 'Pray for Disney.' I saw Asian women, tourists, walking around with Mickey Mouse ears. They were walking around and I saw a little go-kart area, and I saw Tron, and I saw an area—I don't know why that area was highlighted to me—but the Lord showed me this area in Magic Kingdom and the Lord said, 'You need to pray for this.' I could see it was faded out; it was blurred. This is what this looked like. It was blurred out before the vision and they were coming, but I didn't know what they were going to do. There was darkness that was involved around this, and that's what the Lord said: 'Pray.' So, I saw that, and then yesterday I came on and I told you I've had an urgency and I've been praying all day. After it was over, when I came on here, the burden to pray was lifting. But I thought, 'Well, I'll bring it to the public and we'll pray as a family together, and we'll make a lot of this really quickly.' We'll just knock this thing out because I told you, Pais, we were all in deep intercession all afternoon. I told Diana, 'I've never felt that intense prayer in a long time.' It was so intense that you almost felt nauseous. You knew it was something very dark. Well, I got out of here that evening and I said last night, 'Father, what was that? Why did it lift like that? Can you explain to me what the intensity was?' And then He said, 'The event happened.' He said, 'Brandon, there's no reason, no need anymore to try to stop it if it is already manifested.' He said, 'What you were praying over all day was the event that took place in California at the birthday party.' What you were praying for and interceding for—and why Paisley was so involved—my little girl was interceding for the children. She was in travail, and I would say, 'What is a little girl like this travailing over this? What is this?' But she said, 'Daddy, I feel I got to pray. I got to pray.' And she's just praying in tongues, travailing in the spirit, laying hands on her brother, praying over Braden, and praying over Mama. She goes, 'I'm just praying.' Like I said, it was the most intense, and she was praying as loud as she possibly could as a little girl. Finally, I said, 'Are you done, hun?' because I was going to go get us a drink. And she goes, 'No, Daddy, it's not done yet. We got to keep praying.' And she kept praying and praying, and we were all backing her and praying with her. But I thought, 'What is this on my little girl? Holy Spirit, You're pulling her?' I thought it was really interesting. Whenever Paisley prays, she's a great intercessor. We're training her, like all our kids, Braden and Paisley. If and when Megan becomes a manifestation of her—I can't wait to see what God does with her because I know there's giftings there; she's my firstborn—but when Paisley was interceding like that, it felt like it lifted a little bit. Then we came home and started praying some more, but as I brought it to you all, it lifted, but it was already done. It was already done, and four children lost their lives. It was interesting. Every time I see a tragic event happen, I look at it as a prayer fail. I told you Saturday, I saw 14 people. The Lord kept telling me Saturday about 14—'You must intercede for Saturday for 14, there's an event.' Well, quite frankly, with all the things that I get on a day-to-day basis, we take note of it, but I had forgotten about it. I had forgotten about it because it was three days prior, and I've been praying over the President—very intense prayer concerning the White House and the trees and the lighting ceremonies—praying for our nation's capital because of what the Lord told me of a new D-Day. And He's bringing up a new D-Day, a new Red Dawn experience. And He said, 'Brandon, they couldn't get you like D-Day because of how far you are away from them, so they invaded you like a Trojan horse.' For there are many, many men and women in your nation that have come over illegally, that have infiltrated your cities in every single state. Every state. He said it is an infestation of the brotherhood of terrorist activity. And then He warned me. He said, 'Do not stereotype. You are looking for a certain individual and the way they look.' He said, 'They're right in front of your face; they're not hidden.' I don't want to misquote it; Braden had to look up the archive. But the Lord was specifically saying just because they have dark skin and a beard doesn't mean that's the only way they're used. These are even white people, black people, Mexican, Asian—that's all part of the brotherhood. Just because they don't look Arab or Middle Eastern, don't stereotype just because you think that's only the way they're going to be used. The Lord said they have infiltrated even your government. He said, "They're in your police force. They're in your top tier of the Pentagon." He even warned about our FBI, all of it. He told us there are rats within; he keeps talking about the rats within. So, I want to encourage you. We're looking for anybody who is a bogeyman. I want to say don't always think that it's going to be somebody with a turban on their head or a full dress or whatever that that's the enemy, because the people that were infiltrating into the country were not Arab-looking. They were white. And I thought it was interesting because this is what the Spirit of the Lord is telling us to pray for our nation again. And people say, "Who are they?" They keep asking me—even the police officers ask me when I talk to the big people—they always go, "Brandon, you always say they? Who's they? Who's they to you? Why do you say they?" "They" refers to all of it combined. What does that mean to me? The devil worshippers that I see, the occultic practices that are trying to bring forth the principalities through satanic things, through trafficking these children, through sexual practices—doing things with the kids through sacrificial encounters or whatever they are—anybody who is an evildoer. So, when I lump it all together and say "they," it's my verbiage, but I'm trying to say the evildoers, people who are trying to kill, steal, and destroy. And we wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities and powers. We don't wrestle against people. That's what I'm trying to tell you. We're wrestling against the demonic principalities that are messing with them, that are influencing them. So, anybody who's trying to bring harm to anybody—I don't care if you're transgender, like what we've seen with Charlie Kirk and all that, to Muslim, or a devil worshipper—anybody who tries to hurt anybody. Like I said, this is a time like never before that we need to have our eyes open. We had Alex Jones come on in his car; Braden brought that up. You can't play that, but he came on in his car—Braden showed me—and he was warning about General Flynn. Again, warning about General Flynn. And I'm telling you all, I have such a caution of a major storm. You need to really be paying attention to your surroundings during this holiday season, going all the way through with the Pope and the Vatican, Christmas mass, and your Catholic churches. You need to be paying attention. Catholics, you need to be paying attention. I've seen a great attack coming against the Catholic people in their churches, in Europe especially. The Lord keeps bringing up Europe. So, I want to show you this. I think—and this may be AI or this may be a hoax, but it was sent to me and I think it's interesting. There was another thing I thought was interesting: who remembers every time I've told you there was $24 billion that was allocated in an account through the Ukrainians? I even told Alex Jones when I went on his show. Does anybody remember that I went on Alex Jones's show back in January, I believe it was, and I warned everybody that there was $24 billion that was being smuggled from the Ukrainian money to certain accounts through certain senators that had the money? And I know who they are. I'm not going to ever say that publicly, but here he is Zelensky saying, "I can't see it, son; the lights are so bright. I don't know where the money is." He doesn't know where the money is. There is $177 billion, and he only knows where $77 billion of it went. He doesn't know where a hundred billion dollars went. Do you see that on that article? He confesses that they've lost a hundred billion dollars of our tax money. I said $24 billion of it went to a slush fund for corruption; I know for a fact the Lord showed it to me: $24 billion. But he knows of 77 billion; he doesn't know where a hundred of it went. Well, I can tell you where 24 billion of it went. How do you lose a hundred billion dollars? I tell you what, if it was the IRS and you lost a couple thousand, they're going to be on your hiney. But I'm going to tell you, you lose a hundred billion dollars, that's a big deal. That's a really big deal. So, I think that's kind of interesting, don't you? But I warned you about the 24 billion. I want you to see cocaine coming out of his nose as he is speaking. He talks and cocaine starts flying out of his nose. He's been snorting coke before he does his video. Can you show it, son? Not that you want to see cocaine coming out of a man's nose, but my goodness, folks, I told you. What did I tell you is about to happen? I saw during the summit with Putin and Trump in Alaska, I saw a clock on the back wall. I saw the room there and they came to an agreement. Trump said, "You don't want to do this. You have a prosperous nation. You guys got to stop this." He was trying to encourage him by buttering him up because you automatically in a meeting like that come into it with expectations that "I'm not going to listen to you." But you have a guard up, and Trump is the art of the deal; he knows how to negotiate with people. So you have a man that is brilliant. There's the cocaine in his nose. You see it? It's foul. He's doing drugs and leading his people. But the Lord showed me specifically that he was in the meeting and I saw them negotiating taking that bozo out, and I saw a proxy government. I warned you all about this—a proxy government coming in that's pro-Ukraine and pro-Russia in the days ahead. First, they have to get rid of this guy. And I saw him looking over his shoulder trying to find Emmanuel Macron to find some kind of camaraderie. "Please help me." They don't want the war to end. So they had suits behind them; there was a group of businessmen with suits, older men that were wanting to keep pushing this war to take place. And I saw black swan events coming. You say, "What's a black swan event?" An event to provoke war that is trying to draw America in instead of letting them escape. And because we have treaties with these nations, it keeps us in the midst of the mess. They didn't want to de-escalate; they want war. Why? Because the Euro is in trouble. The economy of Europe is in trouble. And war creates money; it creates stimulus. And then I saw the other part is Venezuela. How many times have I told you through the times I've done these videos, I keep seeing Venezuela and Cuba. And I said this has to do not just with drugs; this has to do with oil. This has to do with them joining the BRICS. And when this takes place, you will see it in the days ahead. I told you back in 2024 this was going to take place, and right now I said they'll escalate this thing. Well, the Holy Spirit told you before Trump even got into power, before Trump even became president. He was just running and I told you what the Holy Spirit said. I saw an escalation taking place in Venezuela and I said he will become the new Gaddafi or Saddam Hussein, and that man will be taken out. But when this happened, I saw a haze of witchcraft across the nation in Venezuela. And the Lord said, "I'm bringing a Holy Ghost and fire and a liberation over the people with a proxy government you will see in Venezuela in the days ahead with a major move of My presence that will spread throughout South America." And this was before all this drama even started. If you follow my channel, it's pretty amazing what the Lord tells us, and then we see it in the news later. I think it's pretty fun. I give all glory to Jesus every time because if you know me, it isn't me; it's all Him. He's just a friend. He's my friend. I go, 'Look what you did, Lord. Again, thank you.' Look, go to that, son; I want to show them that. Now, this was interesting because of what I warned you about Candace Owens. I don't know if this is fake, but it's worth listening to because it goes with what I told you was coming for this woman. Before any of the drama took place, we've been praying for her, and now it's all in the news and on social media. She's hiding; she won't even do broadcasts anymore. Listen to this right here. This guy is supposedly—like I said—does anybody know if this is fake? Has anybody seen this? What's happening? What's being said by this secret operative, Black Ops for the French government, coming out and ratting this stuff out? You can tell us in the comment section if you say, 'Brandon, that is a hoax,' but it was sent to us, and I thought that goes with what the Lord said. They will make it look like an accident, so we have to pray for her. He has much more for her to do, but she would go down the rabbit hole, and it would cost her her life. Look at this. Does anybody hear that? It could be AI and it could be a hoax, but it goes alongside the stuff I've been praying about, and that's why it got my attention. I thought that's interesting. I'm not going to waste your time, but I saw that they tried to make it look like an accident, and it goes alongside what the Lord has warned me to pray for that young woman because He said, 'I have much more for her to do.' There's an attack coming against her life as she stares at the rabbit holes. What was a conspiracy will no longer be a conspiracy. Think about what the Lord says. Just because it doesn't happen in your timing—was she talking about Israel? She's talking about how what is a conspiracy will no longer be such a conspiracy after all. It is about her life and the things that the Lord is warning about. All this stuff she's talking about will end up not being a conspiracy at all concerning her life. He said, 'Pray for her.' And that's when I told you about the vans and all this stuff. I'm telling you all, we're in a very serious time. We have all this stuff going on with Zelenskyy, and the Lord called him Pinocchio; he was a liar. He was a puppet, and we see all of the things coming to pass like the Father has warned us time and time again on this channel. It's not a pat on our back; it's, 'Thank you, Jesus, for the accuracy.' Thank you, Father, that we're not flaky. So, every one of you here tonight, do you have any questions? I can answer a couple. I'm going to pray. I wasn't going to pray very long tonight; I'm tired from last night, as that pulls heavy. 68% think it's real; some of you think it's fake. I don't know; to me, it's interesting. That's all. I play it for you because it stood out for what the Lord said, and I went, 'Hold on a minute.' I don't go down the rabbit hole; well, the things the Lord shows me seem like a rabbit hole, don't they? Sometimes it's like it's a conspiracy, but it's truth. It's what's really happening with all this corruption in our governments all around the world. Jesus Christ is coming, ladies and gentlemen. Bottom line, Jesus is coming. Last night, the word of the Lord told us was sobering. It's like when you shake somebody and say, 'Listen, you've got to get right with Him. You're running out of time. Jesus loves you, and He has a plan for your life.' That's why I was praying over the trees, the lighting ceremonies, this Christmas celebration, shopping, and the malls. Then the Lord said, 'Don't forget about the major events in the skies.' Don't forget about—do I feel like 3i-Atlas? People keep asking me, 'Brandon, is it 3i-Atlas anything?' I told you I don't believe 3i-Atlas would be anything. It will be a nothing burger. As I keep praying into this, 3i-Atlas will be a nothing. But it's not what you see; it's what you don't see. There's something else coming. People may not like that, but I tell you what I hear. They focus too much on stuff; it's a distraction. So we pray over that. There's no resistance with Macron concerning the brotherhood of Islam; they were actually working with Macron. They're actually working with Gavin and some of these Democrats because they want them. Do you all remember the shipyards? I told you about the shipyards and the smuggling of things. The Lord showed me union workers being paid to smuggle in weapons for the Red Dawn experience—the Pearl Harbor experience in our nation. It was coming through a port that had guns inside of it, shipping in containers. When the containers got here, they put them on semis or railroads to get them across and smuggle these weapons to people that have infiltrated—explosives and things like that. Remember I told you I saw a shark swimming in the water and the Lord said, 'Do you see the shark? It's established.' That shark is drug traffickers and sex traffickers that have been doing this for decades. He said the shark is automatically here, but the al-Qaeda and the Red Dawn experience is a sucker fish feeding off the shark. They were eating off of it to make sure they got their agenda across because of certain politicians turning a blind eye to it under the Biden administration. Look at what happened when we pulled out of Afghanistan. How many of these people are crazy now? The guy in Fort Worth that got busted yesterday talking trash on the internet and wanting to hurt people—a lot of people said, 'Brandon, that was Crowley, Texas.' I'm very familiar with Crowley; Jerry Savelle had a Bible school there. But I don't know, y'all; there's just a lot, and I try never to bring confusion. The other part was praying over Joel Osteen's church. The Lord said, 'Check your volunteers. Who has infiltrated your volunteers? You need to do a background check on some of these ushers.' I saw men that have infiltrated Joel Osteen's church that are very evil men, and I saw them ushering. I thought that was interesting, and that's what we were praying over yesterday. I saw that—pray over Joel Osteen's church—for there were volunteers, a group of volunteers that were not good people, that were bad. You say, 'Why? How do you judge them?' No, I'm talking about these: these are terrorists. That was part of it. Then I saw shredding documents. I saw shredding, and the Lord said it's similar to what Hillary did with the dossiers, with the bleaching. They were destroying evidence of how they have infiltrated our government; they were shredding the evidence and destroying the computers to avoid being caught with this underground chatter. People ask, 'What's the underground chatter?' It is SIM cards. I see them communicating on that system just like we saw in New York, which was taken down on September 23rd or maybe the 19th. The Lord said there's one in Chicago, there's one in Boston, and there's one in Seattle, and they're communicating; they've set up networks across the nation. You all think it's about just hitting one city; the Lord said they're going to hit all of these cities, and it will not all be on the same day, but it will be strategic to bring fear all the time, to bring an unstable America. 'To the eagle' is what they kept saying. 'We must destroy the eagle. We must come from within. We can't attack them from outside. We will come in.' This has been a long-plotted plan; it wasn't something they thought of overnight. The Lord said this is well-funded, big money. I saw hundreds of millions of dollars that have established this. These people have been here for years, and the Lord said that it's something within. He keeps talking about it: 'The enemy within, the enemy within. Get ready.' And I heard them kicking it off. They said, 'It's time.' I don't know how they were doing this, but they were saying, 'It's time. Let's do this. We've waited long enough. It's time to implement the plan.' I could hear them in the spirit realm, and the Lord allowed me to hear the chatter: 'It's time. We need to implement the plan. We're running out of time.' I saw the pipeline that was starting to get cut off by the NSA. It was a flow like a huge water hose, and as it kept going, it went from a fire hose to a water hose, and it struck down and had a clamp around it. The Lord said, 'That's your NSA. Tell them to pray. Keep praying to cut the head off of this snake.' For if you cut the head off the snake, it will cut the supply down and there will be confusion in the camp. You want confusion in the camp? Cut off the means of how they communicate. So what does this mean? There is a flow still going from these cities. New York got cut down; our FBI and our people cut down the communication in New York. It was a major supply line of communication that got crimped in one area. It was further east because it went like this, going from west to east. In the spirit, when I was praying into it, the Lord said it's still a major flow through here, but it got a kink in the chain and the hose got smaller. Do you see it? The Lord is showing it—you're looking into the vision, and what He's showing is a metaphor. It's not a hose, but He's trying to show you through pictures. It's a supply chain; it's a hose and it's full, but it got kinked off here. Where did it get kinked off? New York. They found the computers; they found the stuff, the SIM cards—over 100,000 SIM cards. But the Lord said there's much communication here still, from Boston, Chicago, Seattle, and it goes across the nation. All these other places, they're communicating, and it was an underground communication. The Lord keeps talking about an underground chatter. Diana said she thought it might be Reddit or whatever, and I thought, 'I don't think so.' I think it's some kind of burner phones—some kind of number they know. There's something more to this, folks, than just some kind of backroom chat on Reddit. It's burner phones; this is very sophisticated. And it went clear to Honolulu, Hawaii. We saw that again. The Lord said, 'Pray over Honolulu, Hawaii.' Remember? So, okay, 30 minutes. How's that? They've infiltrated at all levels. Yes, they have infiltrated at all levels. Thank you, son. They have infiltrated at all levels. Are you looking at the transcript? Yeah. I love you. You're such a good boy. That's right. They've infiltrated at all levels. The Lord said, 'At every level they have infiltrated, even into your Pentagon.' The man that was communicating that I saw was a white man and he was heavy. He was not Iranian-looking. So, all glory to Jesus. I'm still praying about going to the White House if I'm still invited. He said 'heresy' a lot. The Lord said 'heresy,' and He said 'Mecca.' Yes, Mecca. He talked about Mecca and he talked about—I don't know—'Bala'... play that word, show that word. That was another word that came out in tongues. He called Mecca and this 'B' word, because we were praying over Ramadan. Ramadan, yeah, and that's in March. The word... it all has to do with the Muslims. Yes, what we were praying for last night. It's an uprising. Do you remember the man I saw in the New York subway? He had that white hat on, and I said he has a white outfit on. He was so sober in his face because he was about to blow himself up. I don't know what kind of security they have. I've never been to New York. I've never even been on a subway. What kind of security do they have when I keep seeing these 3D printed things that are able to go through security checkpoints? I told you I saw how it was made, and it wasn't through any metal. There was no metal involved. You see these things, and I said if they perfect it, they'll use it a lot. They were trying to perfect it, and the Lord said they've spent millions of dollars trying to perfect this. So, is that good? I gave the highlights; it's 39 minutes. I don't want to be redundant, but there's so many of you that go, 'Brandon, can you give me the cliff notes at the beginning?' I get the emails. This is me doing that for you. I try to respect your time. I know there's a lot of you. It's like, 'Hey, I don't hurry the Holy Ghost up.' When He's done, He's done. If the video goes four hours, it goes four hours. So, I give you the cliff notes at the beginning. But I will not do that to a prophetic word as powerful as the one from last night. You can go back and listen to it. I'm not going to chop it up; it's dishonoring. People say, 'Brandon, there's something different about you.' Yes. When the angel visited, there was something that happened. For those who say, 'I don't talk to angels'—I don't communicate to angels like they're my BFFs. They're always looking to the Father. For those of you who are ignorant: they don't sit and chatter with you. They're looking at the Father. They don't even pay attention to you. They'll communicate what they were sent to say, like him and the things he told me were coming. But after he's done with his message, he looks to the Father. If they're attracted to you, it's a demon. The angels are not there to be your friend. They're not there for you to talk to and say, 'Hey, let's hang out.'
